tracks.meaning: a record of events, transactions, or system activities stored in a file or database for monitoring or debugging purposes
to keep a record of something or to track and document information over time
a section of a tree trunk that has been felled and is ready for processing or sale
a record or account of something that is kept or written down
a natural record of past events preserved in rock strata, fossils, or tree rings
the sum of the diagonal elements of a square matrix
a record kept by a ship's officer documenting events, position, and weather conditions during a voyage
a detailed record of rock layers and subsurface conditions obtained from drilling or excavation
to score a run or point in cricket by hitting the ball and running between wickets
